name: Fast Typer 3
author: Poki
description: Fast Typer 3 is a fun typing game where you can show off your keyboard skills to your friends! Type as many words as possible before the timer ends. How to play: To play this game, try to type every word you see on the screen quickly and make sure to not make any mistakes. Get a streak of six consecutive words to receive more time and type away! About the creator: Eidosk is a game developer that specializes in educational and skill-based games. Check out other games made by Eidosk: Fast Typer & Fast Typer 2.
